summary: Group Deals System Refinement testing complete. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: (1) Homepage Group Deals section with featured deal cards, progress bars, View All button. (2) Deal detail page with mobile sticky CTA (visible on mobile, hidden on desktop). (3) Post-join success screen with live progress, spots remaining, time left, WhatsApp + Copy Link share buttons, invite friends CTA, trust messaging. (4) Admin Group Deals page with campaign list, stats cards, Create Campaign dialog with Live Profit Calculator. (5) Customer portal pages (Orders, Invoices, Quotes) show mobile card layouts on mobile and tables on desktop.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed campaigns for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Deals System Refinement verified. Key features tested: (1) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns creates campaign with margin validation (5% minimum). (2) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/join creates commitment ONLY — does NOT change campaign status to 'successful', sets threshold_met flag when threshold reached but status stays 'active'. (3) GET /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id} returns campaign with commitments array and threshold_met flag. (4) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/finalize creates buyer orders + ONE aggregated vendor back order (VBO-{campaign_id}-{date}), campaign becomes 'finalized'. (5) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/cancel marks campaign 'failed', commitments to 'refund_pending'. (6) POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id}/process-refunds marks refund_pending as 'refunded'. (7) GET /api/public/group-deals returns active deals ranked by progress/urgency, hides internal fields (vendor_cost, margin_per_unit, etc). (8) GET /api/public/group-deals/featured returns top 6 active deals for homepage. (9) GET /api/admin/group-deals/vendor-back-orders lists aggregated vendor back orders. (10) Homepage has Group Deals section with featured deal cards, progress bars, timers, trust messaging. (11) Deal detail page has mobile sticky CTA bar (visible on mobile, hidden on desktop). (12) Post-join success screen shows live progress, remaining spots, share buttons (WhatsApp + Copy Link), invite friends CTA. (13) Customer portal Orders/Invoices/Quotes pages have mobile card layouts (md:hidden) alongside desktop tables.

details: POST /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns creates campaign with margin calculation
Price below vendor cost returns 400 error
Does NOT change campaign status to 'successful'
Sets threshold_met flag when threshold reached but status stays 'active'
GET /api/admin/group-deals/campaigns/{id} returns campaign with commitments array
Creates ONE aggregated vendor back order (VBO-{campaign_id}-{date})
GET /api/public/group-deals returns active campaigns ranked by progress/urgency
Internal fields hidden: vendor_cost, margin_per_unit, margin_pct, vendor_threshold, commission_mode, affiliate_share_pct, created_by, threshold_met
GET /api/public/group-deals/{id} returns deal detail without internal fields
VBO includes vbo_number, campaign_id, product_name, total_quantity, vendor costs, preparation_status
Featured deal cards with progress bars
Mobile sticky CTA bar visible on mobile viewport
Mobile sticky CTA hidden on desktop viewport
Desktop Join Deal button visible on desktop
Post-join success screen shows after joining
Orders page: mobile cards visible on mobile, table visible on desktop
Invoices page: mobile cards visible on mobile, table visible on desktop
Quotes page: mobile cards visible on mobile, table visible on desktop
